subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, Haifa, 1914-04
subcodes.first_line: In past you must not imagine that the prophets spoke things which the people could not understand. They were very well understood by their contemporaries
subcodes.subjects: @outward and inward meanings, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @limits of language
